bot0:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: Deadeye (bow) killed us in 4/5 recent rounds — open areas are lethal. Increasing kiteRangeBias to 4 maximizes distance from bows. Raising targetThreatAversion to 130 ensures bows are prioritized above all else. Switching posture to defensive reduces risky engagements. Enabling bowAlwaysCharge allows

lessons: Deadeye (bow) killed us in 3 of last 4 rounds — retreat to cover or narrow corridors immediately on sight; open areas are lethal.
Sword users were killed 18 times in last 5 rounds — aggressively prioritize them; they lack ranged options and die quickly to staff sweeps if caught in range.
Spear users (Lancer, Reaper) killed us in rounds 405, 411, and 408 — avoid open engagements; spear has 93+ sightings in 3 of last 5 rounds and outranges staff.
Shredder (daggers) killed us in round 407 — maintain distance; their speed and close-range burst outmaneuver staff’s slow swing and turn rate.
Staff has 23 wins in 136 rounds — highest win rate of any weapon; continue using it but avoid prolonged fights against shields or ranged enemies.
Hazard_storm rounds (408, 411) saw 109+ bow and 117+ spear sightings — prioritize eliminating ranged enemies before zone collapse.
bot0:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Staff remains the highest-win-rate weapon despite recent losses, and no data suggests a superior alternative.

bot1:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: Bow is dying to staff/spear in open terrain (4/6 recent deaths). Increasing kiteRangeBias to +1 creates safer distance from long-reach melee. Raising targetThreatAversion to 60 reduces risky engagements against high-threat spears/staffs. Enabling retreatFireWhileKiting lets us shoot chasers during r

bot2:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: Bow is dying to grapple and shield in close quarters. Lowering grappleCloseMinGap to 0.5 ensures we grapple to escape *before* enemies close in, not after. Keep kiteRangeBias at +3 for maximum range buffer. Increase targetThreatAversion to 120 to prioritize fleeing grapple/shield users even harder.

lessons: Bow wins only when sword usage is high (>40) and shield usage is low (<20); in 7 of last 10 rounds, shield usage exceeded 50 and bow won 0/7 — avoid bow when shields dominate.
Reaper (staff) killed us in rounds 407 and 411 — staff’s AoE nullifies bow at mid-range; retreat or flank immediately when Reaper is spotted.

Sword users (Warden, Executioner, Ranger, Hook, Scorpion, Viper, Juggernaut) were killed 9 times in rounds 406 and 410 — prioritize isolated sword users at range; they die quickly to bow when not shie
Shield users (Fortress, Warden) killed us in rounds 403 and 413 — never engage shield users with bow unless cornered or low on blocks; their blocks negate ranged advantage.
Lancer (spear) has 44 kills vs us and killed us 4x in last 10 rounds — spear outranges bow and dominates open terrain; retreat on sight and avoid open areas.
Andrew-Test (bow) killed us in round 408 despite being killed by us — bow vs bow is high-risk; avoid direct range duels and use cover or flanking.
bot1:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Staff has the highest win rate (15/83) in history summary and consistently counters bow users by negating their range advantage, as seen in Reaper’s kills.

lessons: Hook (grapple) killed you in 5 of last 7 rounds — retreat or reposition instantly on sight; grapple closes range faster than bow can react.
Fortress (shield) killed you in 3 of last 5 rounds — never engage head-on; kite from corners or narrow passages where shield can't fully block arrows.
Sword users caused 9 of your last 10 deaths — prioritize them aggressively with headshots at medium range, but only if you have clear escape routes.
Bow win rate is 21/130 (16.2%) — avoid open maps and high-traffic zones; win rate drops to 0% in 3 of last 4 rounds when grapple or shield are dominant.
Hazard_storm and fast_zone modifiers increase enemy mobility (grapple + shield sightings up 300%) — stick to cover, avoid open terrain, and target grapple users first.
You achieved a 4-0 kill streak in round 412 — this happened when sword users were isolated and you had line-of-sight control; replicate by camping chokepoints.
bot2:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Grapple outperforms bow in recent rounds by closing distance against sword/shield users and dominating in hazard_storm/fast_zone modifiers where mobility wins.
